name: PEMF Therapy Device
tagline: Pulsed electromagnetic field therapy device with Nextion touchscreen interface — biotech hardware for longevity and recovery
description: Custom PEMF (Pulsed Electromagnetic Field) therapy device build. Research-backed — 17 RCTs covering 1,197 patients show significant pain reduction and functional gains. Nextion display for frequency/intensity control. Deep research into Flexner Report suppression of electrotherapy, institutional barriers to adoption, and synergy with nutritional protocols.
content_angles: Building a biotech device with AI assistance — hardware meets health research
PEMF therapy: the FDA-approved modality mainstream medicine ignores
Nextion touchscreen interface for medical device control
Flexner Report deep dive: how early 1900s politics still suppresses electrotherapy
